text_block_list.text:
While I'm out shopping, I notice a<n>group of
Umamusume walking in my<n>direction...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Awww, maaan... We would've won if<n>I'd just
managed to hit that perfect<n>ball in the eighth
inning...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
No, it was my fault! My mess-up in<n>the bottom of
the ninth cost us those<n>runs...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I know! How's about we have a<n>meeting? We
can reflect on the game<n>over some honeyade.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um, well, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry! I think I forgot something, so<n>I'm gonna go
grab it! You three can go<n>on without me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: See ya!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Off she goes. Well, we can still<n>grab some
honeyade without her, I<n>guess.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, silly me! I forgot something<n>too! Better go
get it before someone<n>else does!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
What?! You too?! Okay, then we can<n>all get some
honeyade together<n>another time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for flaking when it was my idea<n>in the first
place! Catch you guys next<n>time!

I think they're headed under the<n>overpass... I'm
a little curious about<n>why Mejiro Ryan's acting
so<n>strangely, so I decide to check on<n>them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's start with some wall ball<n>drills! About
a hundred should do!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryyyyyan. Did you find what you left<n>behind?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Gah! What are you doing here?! I,<n>uh...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! I suddenly got the urge to<n>play a game
of catch! Wanna join<n>me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ines...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's do it!

They're totally silent as they throw<n>the ball back
and forth. All that can be<n>heard is the baseball
cutting through<n>the air and landing in their gloves.
Thwump...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey, Ryan! Throw it back!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...It's still eating away at me. That<n>two-run hit on
my pitch at the bottom<n>of the ninth... It cost us our
lead, and<n>the win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I threw such an easy<n>ball. The
more time passes, the more<n>frustrated I feel.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
A loss is a loss, I can accept that. But<n>I didn't
practice enough to know that I<n>did all I could! And
that regret's<n>driving me crazy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
ARRRRRGH! This is eating at me so<n>bad! I wanna
practice harder and get<n>better!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure no one's gonna be<n>able to hit my
pitches! All strikes or<n>nothing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You'll nail it next time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, could you throw me that same<n>pitch from
earlier? The one from the<n>bottom of the ninth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What? You don't have any protective<n>gear on! If
it's a bad ball, you'll get<n>hurt!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'll take any ball you throw at me. I<n>just want
you to trust me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Okay! Then I'm not gonna hold<n>back!

Mejiro Ryan takes a deep breath in...<n>then winds
up a huge pitch.
SWOOOOOSH... DOOMPH!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Your snap's lazy! That's an easy hit!<n>C'mon,
put some power into it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ines... Okay! I'm gonna keep throwing<n>pitches
until we're both satisfied!

The two Umamusume are burning<n>with
competitive spirit... The day they<n>seize victory
doesn't seem too far off<n>now.
